Notice Of Motion And Motion For Relief From Entry Of Default
Off Calendar May-08-2026 Continued To Jun-09-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT MANG VAN (SF) INC.'S MOTION FOR RELIEF FROM ENTRY OF DEFAULT

No appearances. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: continued to June 9, 2026 on the Court's own motion. Judge: Charles F. Haines, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (501/CFH)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-23-2026 Continued To Jul-08-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Off Calendar Feb-06-2026 Continued To Apr-08-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-11-2025 Continued To Feb-25-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-24-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances
Raymond Erlach, Esq. for Plaintiff Thomas J Linehan, Jr. via Zoom Video Webinar
Richard Zuromski, Esq. for Defendant Sean Nghia Kha via Zoom Video Webinar

Hearing held.

in re: DEFENDANT SEAN KHA DEMURRER to COMPLAINT

Defendant argues as to the tentative ruling and offers proof. Defendant request to covert the demurrer to a motion to strike.
Plaintiff responds to Defendant argument and as to the requested Motion to strike.
Defendant replies to Plaintiff's argument.

After considering the arguments, the Court modifies the tentative ruling, see scanned order of the Court.

Order prepared by the court, signed and filed this day.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss; Clerk: K. Valdes; Not Reported. (D501)
